name: Pre-Wiz OS Update Survey
description: Survey for the pre-update play in site.yml (refresh repos + upgrade packages before the Wiz query)

spec.question_description: Run an OS package update + upgrade before querying Wiz? When false the pre-update play is a no-op.
When true the update only reports what would change (check_mode) and never reboots. Also gates the Wiz remediation play.
Space- or comma-separated package names to exclude from the upgrade (e.g. 'kernel docker-ce nginx'). Leave blank to upgrade everything.
Reboot the host after upgrade only when the OS reports a reboot is required. Ignored during a dry run.
